case_title: SHOHET, STEPHEN B. M.D. VS MEIS, FRED G.

docket_entries.description: SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JUN-08-1995, GRANTED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHOHET, STEPHEN B. M.D. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MEIS, FRED G. $3,475.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,520.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHOHET, STEPHEN B. M.D. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MEIS, FRED G. $1,850.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,895.00, THIS REFLECTS AMOUNT DEFEND. OWES AS OF 6-8-95. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT MEIS, FRED G. HEARING SET FOR JUN-08-1995 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MEIS, FRED G.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHOHET, STEPHEN B. M.D. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MEIS, FRED G. $3,475.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,520.00, DEFENDANT HAS PAID $625.00 TOWARD JUDGMENT. AMOUNT OWING IS $2,850.00 PLUS COSTS.
